seosona-knowledge.description: Shared SEOSONA knowledge base (MotherBrain OS 3_MEMORY/knowledge_items, incl. all UAP-harvested KIs). Tool: knowledge_search(query, limit) -> {backend, results:[{title, portablePath, score}]}. This satellite queries the central brain so KIs routed to seosona-ux-ui are actually visible here at runtime.
